response.overview: A gritty vérité story of young, hungry and super-talented musicians struggling to find the promised land of a record deal - without selling out. Starring Grammy winning musician Kebbi Williams, broadway star Eisa Davis and Robb Mallard.
response.tagline: A gritty vérité story of young, hungry and super-talented musicians struggling to find the promised land of a record deal - without selling out.
response.title: Brass Tacks
